assertions.reason: Single-source search stayed within the selected source and respected the requested cap. Live artifact evidence was collected with Crossref because Semantic Scholar returned HTTP 429 during smoke testing; deterministic CLI coverage confirms the same limit/source behavior generically.

evidence.label: built-cli single-source smoke
evidence.command: env -i HOME=/root PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin SEARCH_PAPER_ENV_FILE=/root/workspace/github/jtsang4/search-paper-cli/.tmp/user-testing/core-behavior/.env "/root/workspace/github/jtsang4/search-paper-cli/.tmp/user-testing/search-paper-cli" search --source crossref --limit 1 "graph neural networks"
evidence.observation: JSON response contained exactly one paper, requested_sources/used_sources were ["crossref"], source_results.crossref was 1, and every returned paper source was crossref.

evidence.label: deterministic CLI test
evidence.observation: TestSingleSourceSearch passed and verifies single-source scoping plus per-source limit handling.

assertions.reason: Unified search returned one structured payload with query metadata, selected sources, per-source counts, per-source errors, total results, and normalized paper records while preserving usable results from the successful source.

evidence.label: built-cli partial-success smoke
evidence.command: env -i HOME=/root PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin SEARCH_PAPER_ENV_FILE=/root/workspace/github/jtsang4/search-paper-cli/.tmp/user-testing/core-behavior/.env "/root/workspace/github/jtsang4/search-paper-cli/.tmp/user-testing/search-paper-cli" search --source crossref,semantic --limit 2 "graph neural networks"
evidence.observation: Response stayed machine-readable with requested_sources=["crossref","semantic"], source_results.crossref=2, source_results.semantic=0, errors.semantic="unexpected status 429", total=2, and normalized paper objects from Crossref.

evidence.label: deterministic CLI test
evidence.observation: TestUnifiedPartialSuccess passed and verifies mixed success returns one envelope with successful papers plus count-0/error entry for the failing source.

assertions.reason: Deterministic CLI coverage confirmed cross-source deduplication prefers DOI, then normalized title+authors, then paper_id, and preserves the first record according to merge order.

evidence.label: deterministic CLI test
evidence.observation: TestDedupeOrder passed with selected source order crossref,semantic,arxiv and asserted a total of 4 deduped papers with Crossref survivors winning duplicate collisions.

assertions.reason: Search results use the stable normalized paper schema with the required fields and consistent array serialization for authors.

evidence.label: deterministic CLI test
evidence.observation: TestSearchSchema passed and asserted paper_id, title, authors, abstract, doi, published_date, pdf_url, url, and source are present on normalized results.

evidence.label: built-cli schema smoke
evidence.command: env -i HOME=/root PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin SEARCH_PAPER_ENV_FILE=/root/workspace/github/jtsang4/search-paper-cli/.tmp/user-testing/core-behavior/.env "/root/workspace/github/jtsang4/search-paper-cli/.tmp/user-testing/search-paper-cli" search --source crossref --limit 1 "graph neural networks"
evidence.observation: Live artifact JSON included the normalized top-level paper keys and authors serialized as an array.

assertions.reason: Deterministic CLI coverage verified the year filter is forwarded only to Semantic Scholar and omitted from other selected sources during multi-source search.

evidence.label: deterministic CLI test
evidence.observation: TestSemanticYearFilter passed; recorded search requests showed semantic received Year="2024-2025" while crossref received an empty Year field.

assertions.reason: Deterministic CLI coverage confirmed per-source counts represent pre-dedupe hits and the final total is the merged post-dedupe count, never exceeding the summed source counts.

evidence.label: deterministic CLI test
evidence.observation: TestSearchCounts passed and asserted semantic=2, crossref=2, merged total=3, and total <= semantic+crossref.

frictions.description: Live Semantic Scholar smoke requests returned HTTP 429 during this run, so deterministic targeted CLI tests were used for semantic-specific assertions to avoid provider-rate-limit noise.
frictions.resolution: Validated semantic-related behaviors with existing targeted go test coverage and used Crossref-backed artifact smoke commands for observable CLI JSON behavior.

summary: Validated 6 assertions for core CLI search behavior: 6 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Built-artifact smoke checks confirmed single-source and partial-success JSON behavior; targeted CLI tests provided deterministic proof for dedupe, schema, year forwarding, and count semantics.
